title: Sanji Nearly Dies from Joy
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Nami, King Neptune, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Luffy, Sanji. The core story beat is sanji nearly dies from joy.
scene: The scene centers on sanji nearly dies from joy, with Unknown person #1, Nami, King Neptune, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Luffy, Sanji driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is bad. We've got four devil fruit users on board

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Dammit!! I can't fight this crazy current...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's one outrageous entry!! Could seriously backfire on 'em, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't know whether they'll have survived or not...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...but we should follow just in case. We can't have the Neptunee army getting to 'em before we do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that said, we should return to Noah first. The boss needs to hear about this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that the pirate who shattered arlong-san's ambitions...

summary: Sanji Nearly Dies from Joy. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
